method-verb-mismatch.title: API design: HTTP method does not match the operation verb (reads via POST, create via GET)

inconsistent-update-verb.title: API design: 'update' semantics are split across set/update/modify and PUT/PATCH/POST inconsistently

path-collisions.title: API design: identical method+path reused across unrelated services (no service namespacing)

duplicated-operations.title: API design: whole operation sets are duplicated verbatim across two services

inconsistent-param-naming.title: API design: path id params are named inconsistently (bare {id} and {x_uuid} vs the usual {resource_id})

missing-endpoint-description.title: Docs: endpoints with an empty Description

missing-param-description.title: Docs: path/query parameters with no description

no-error-response-schema.title: Docs: error responses (4xx/5xx) never document a response body/schema

no-success-response-schema.title: Docs: success (2xx) response documents no schema

required-body-no-model.title: Docs: a required request body with no model/schema linked

empty-models.title: Docs: model pages that define no fields

model-fields-no-description.title: Docs: model fields with no description

model-name-typos.title: Docs: likely typos in model names

deprecated-endpoints.title: Docs: endpoints marked DEPRECATED in their description
